Process

3 Steps to Your New Life Abroad

01
🎯

Take the Quiz

Tell us your budget, lifestyle, climate preference, and what matters most. 7 questions, under 60 seconds.

02
🧠

AI Analyzes

Claude AI cross-references your answers with real visa laws, cost of living data, and expat reports.

03
✈️

Get Your Plan

Receive your top 3 countries with visa paths, cost breakdowns, and a personalized 90-day relocation plan.

Features

Everything You Need to Make the Move

AI-Powered Matching

Claude AI analyzes your lifestyle, budget, and goals to surface the perfect countries for you.

Visa Intelligence

Every visa pathway available to Americans — sorted by ease, cost, and timeline.

Safety & Healthcare

Real expat data on safety ratings, healthcare quality, and cost of living.

90-Day Relocation Plan

Step-by-step action plan from deciding to landing — nothing left to figure out.

Destinations

Curated for Americans

Every country researched for American-specific visa pathways, English accessibility, and expat community strength.
